feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Plague doctors are one of the most timeless, aesthetic designs in history. One o…
entry.content: Plague doctors are one of the most timeless, aesthetic designs in history. One of the coolest looking outfits ever made.
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /b/ Random: I'm a 23 year old male and I've been seeing a 41 year old woman for the past 4 m…
entry.content: I'm a 23 year old male and I've been seeing a 41 year old woman for the past 4 months or so. I met her at a local yoga class dealing with some leg cramp issues I've been having and we hit it off and basically have been in this casual thing for a while. I never had a GF and she took my virginity knowingly. She's a divorcee and has a 5 year old kid, but I haven't had any interaction with ex-husband and I don't interact with kid at all that much, it's been a lot of "My kid's asleep, come over and w
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their p

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Linus has chosen to spit in the face of wise men who came before him. The 'Trust…
entry.content: Linus has chosen to spit in the face of wise men who came before him. The 'Trusting Trust' problem Thompson demonstrated in his 1984 Turing award lecture proved that a compiler can be modified to insert backdoors into everything it compiles, including future copies of the compiler itself, completely undetectable in the source code. This problem has never been solved. Wheeler's method for Diverse Double Compiling only solves it in theory and relies on the assumption of an already trusted 2nd comp
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: WTF, I thought /g/ told me that JXL was going to obliterate Webp in lossy image …
entry.content: WTF, I thought /g/ told me that JXL was going to obliterate Webp in lossy image compression. That only a clinically retarded inbred hillbilly mouth breather would ever even consider Webp. ffmpeg -framerate 1/3 -i %%02d.png -c:v libvpx-vp9 -cpu-used 0 -r 6 -g 9999 -b:v 0 -crf 0 -qmin 0 -qmax 0 -pix_fmt gbrp out.webm cwebp -sharp_yuv -m 6 -pass 10 -size 60000 01.png -o 02.webp cjxl 01.png 03.jxl -e 10 -q 27
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why is it that almost all imageboards and textboards lean far-right, like 4chan …
entry.content: why is it that almost all imageboards and textboards lean far-right, like 4chan and 2channel? is it because of something inherent to the structure of imageboards?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How many more years will it take for Linux to dominate as a gaming platform? Wit…
entry.content: How many more years will it take for Linux to dominate as a gaming platform? With its current level of dominance I can’t bring myself to switch. I’m not about to go back and forth between two operating systems. If the situation ever becomes worth switching, it’ll mean throwing windows out the window.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1041
entry.content: /acrg/ - Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1041 Traditional arts Edition Remember to SCREENCAP your links so we can laugh when they delete their posts. Talk about artists or commissioners, mostly the bad ones or those who got under your skin. Share your experiences and get angry with us. For all artists (and commissioners who are close friends with artists) here, beware of: Horu, Pixxy, OkiOppai, Timedwatcher, AnythingGoes, Skitterleaf, kathielnotfound (Jocelyn Jones), and Snoopcrow/jbunny/j6un9
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /news/ News: Corruption at all levels: WH teleprompter operator made money betting on Trump's speeches
entry.content: https://abcnews.com/US/white-house- teleprompter-operator-made-100k-bet ting-trumps/story?id=134764573 President Donald Trump's longtime teleprompter operator is believed to have made tens of thousands of dollars by placing bets on more than a dozen of Trump's speeches on the prediction market Kalshi, federal investigators with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission found, sources familiar with the matter told ABC News. Gabriel Perez, a technical assistant to the president who has been operati
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What is everyone's daily driver AI platform? I'm not even talking about specific…
entry.content: What is everyone's daily driver AI platform? I'm not even talking about specifically for coding, images, and work. I just mean for general knowledge and daily conversations/questions? I've been using Gemini primarily because I have a Google Pixel phone, but it's let me down a few times. The "flash" version will make more mistakes and misinformation compared to the "thinking" model, but that makes sense. I started using the thinking model just for the reinforced accuracy and information. I don't
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #365
entry.content: Summer Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. All games, anime and gacha waifus wel
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This board is full of basement dwellers trying to make excuses for why they don'…
entry.content: This board is full of basement dwellers trying to make excuses for why they don't get off their lazy asses and watch Obsession or Odyssey. So they make up all sorts of mental gymnastics for not going and seeing it. They actually believe the director of Obsession was shilling on /tv/. LMAO And now they're gonna keep posting screencaps of Elliot and Lupita to convince themselves, see. I did the right thing. Why are you here? You don't watch movies or tv. You're just here to complain.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: Korean YouTuber Apologizes After Ordering 20 In-Flight Meals During Long-Haul Flight Sparks Backlash
entry.content: >Korean YouTuber Yuno came under fire after uploading a video in which he ordered 20 rounds of in-flight meals and snacks, including seven bowls of instant noodles, during a long-haul flight. >The video showed him repeatedly requesting a wide variety of menu items, including lobster salad, beef stroganoff, bibimbap, beef rice bowls, tiramisu, and other in-flight dishes. >At the end of the video, Yuno thanked the cabin crew, saying, "I spent the whole flight eating, and before I knew it, we'd arr
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: In Brazil, it's common to have sex outdoors and it's not taboo
entry.content: In Brazil, it's common for young lovers to be so enamored that they go on hikes through the jungle to secret beaches and have sex along the way and at the beach and inside lagoons etc. While this sex is usually done in less travelled trails only locals know about the rise of all-trails has increased encounters of hiking enthusiasts with these outdoor sexual escapades. Contrary to popular belief, this has not led to a decrease in outdoor sex. It's simply led to new norms surrounding the practice.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Has anybody seen the insane amount of AI videos on social medias? These accounts…
entry.content: Has anybody seen the insane amount of AI videos on social medias? These accounts on TikTok and Instagram have a huge following, they systematically have the same caption like “V stepped in the crowd, taking in live performances at Vogue World[…]”. They also have other bot accounts systematically replying “what is the context of this?” Or “who is this?” To get engagement bait, and it works AI now literally has it’s own network of AI generated content and knows what to post and it for sure knows t

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Unironically I think this is the best looking modern car. I've saved up 50k and …
entry.content: Unironically I think this is the best looking modern car. I've saved up 50k and want to buy the BMW i3 EV as my new daily. Fed up of the running costs of my previous ICE cars, repairs, service, etc. A liter in Germany costs 2 euro. I can charge at home instead. Just wanna know, is it usually a bad idea to buy the first batch of a BMW EV? With previous gens I often read that it's better to buy the facelift model because it eliminated most issues. But given that it's all electric is it still valid
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The f…
entry.content: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The first time, when I was 14, I had to smoke five joints in a row before I felt anything. Other times, I tried smoking as many as three joints in a row and felt nothing. The high when I was 14 was sort of like everything slowing down drastically, and the thought of "passing out high" kept repeating in my head. On Thursday, almost 20 years later, I got high on THC again, but this was definitely a very different experience
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >be 90s >every sound system has an equalizer >fast forward 2020s >"noooooooo tha…
entry.content: >be 90s >every sound system has an equalizer >fast forward 2020s >"noooooooo that's audiophile equipment, you'll need to drop 2000 dollarinos!"
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Josh Sawyer does not like the way Bethesda handles its open world balance
entry.content: >controversial statement I'm going to make... Fallout 3 was not a hard game. Skyrim is also not a hard game. The combat in these games is not super challenging. Skyrim is a game that everybody plays forever, and this is not the only reason, but the fact that it is quite forgiving to the player in terms of scaling is part of it. You can wander the whole map to your heart's content, and with a few exceptions you're probably not gonna die. Same also applies to Fallout 3. >In New Vegas, I was trying
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Black Ops 2
entry.content: Im having more fun with this than any game I have played in the last 5 years or so.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE
entry.content: >https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ft CvnEE6rfI You know they're just making this as an excuse to never make turn-based JRPGs again, right? When this cheap recycle fails to sell 3m on launch day Square Enix is just going to shrug and go back to remakes to see if they can milk a few more dollars out of the dwindling cattle that still pretend their recent games are even passable. You can tell because they are putting zero dollara into marketing it: they WANT this to fail.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games
